message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam responseMessageBelowArrow true
skinparam ParticipantPadding 25
skinparam BoxPadding 10
skinparam Shadowing false
skinparam ArrowColor #333
skinparam LifeLineBorderColor #999
skinparam LifeLineBackgroundColor #fff

participant "ClassPathXmlApplicationContext" as CPXAC
participant "AbstractApplicationContext" as AAC
participant "DefaultListableBeanFactory" as DLBF
participant "AbstractBeanFactory" as ABF
participant "DefaultSingletonBeanRegistry" as DSBR
participant "AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory" as AABF
participant "BeanDefinitionValueResolver" as BDVR

CPXAC -> AAC : refresh()
AAC -> DLBF : refreshBeanFactory()
DLBF --> AAC : finishBeanFactoryInitialization() : spring bean 实例化入口
AAC -> DLBF : preInstantiateSingletons

DLBF -> ABF : getBean() 真正获取bean的开始XXX,是Spring通用的实现方法包含各方
ABF -> ABF : doGetBean 真正获取bean的开始XXX,是Spring通用的实现方法包含各方
ABF -> DSBR : getSingleton 从缓存中获取Springbean对象
DSBR -> DSBR : getSingleton(beanName,earlyReference)\n第一次进行时发现没有缓存的bean对象
DSBR --> ABF : 第一次返回为空
ABF -> DSBR : markBeanAsCreated bean创建过程比较长，标记bean正在创建 markBeanAsCreated
ABF -> DSBR : getSingleton(beanName, 对象工厂)\n此处是一个lambda表达式：
DSBR -> DSBR : beforeSingletonCreation
ABF -> AABF : createBean lambda中执行方法

AABF -> AABF : doCreateBean
AABF -> AABF : createBeanInstance 内部函数
AABF -> DSBR : earlySingletonExposure\n是否进行提前对象暴露：addSingletonFactory：将对象放在三级缓存
DSBR -> DSBR : addSingletonFactory 将对象放入三级缓存
AABF -> AABF : populateBean(bean 属性填充,循环依赖的关键即bean之间的属性填充)
AABF -> AABF : applyPropertyValues
AABF -> BDVR : resolveValueIfNecessary,处理bean里面的依赖
BDVR --> AABF : resolveReference

DLBF -> ABF : getBean 获取bean属性中依赖的bean对象
ABF -> ABF : doGetBean
ABF -> DSBR : getSingleton 从缓存中获取Springbean对象
DSBR -> DSBR : getSingleton(beanName,earlyReference)\n第二次进行时发现类型依赖的bean对象
DSBR --> ABF : 第二次返回为空
ABF -> DSBR : markBeanAsCreated bean创建过程比较长，标记bean正在创建 markBeanAsCreated
ABF -> DSBR : getSingleton(beanName, 对象工厂)\n此处是一个lambda表达式：
DSBR -> DSBR : beforeSingletonCreation
ABF -> AABF : createBean lambda中执行方法

AABF -> AABF : doCreateBean
AABF -> AABF : createBeanInstance 内部函数
AABF -> DSBR : earlySingletonExposure\n是否进行提前对象暴露：addSingletonFactory：将对象放在三级缓存
DSBR -> DSBR : addSingletonFactory 将对象放入三级缓存(此处特别注意：singletonFactories)
AABF -> AABF : populateBean(bean 属性填充,循环依赖的关键即bean之间的属性填充)
AABF -> AABF : applyPropertyValues
AABF -> BDVR : resolveValueIfNecessary,处理bean里面的依赖
BDVR --> AABF : resolveReference

DLBF -> ABF : getBean 获取bean属性中依赖的bean对象
ABF -> ABF : doGetBean
ABF -> DSBR : getSingleton 从缓存中获取Springbean对象
DSBR -> DSBR : getSingleton(beanName,earlyReference)
DSBR --> ABF : ObjectFactory<> singletonFactory = this.singletonFactories.get(beanName);\n从三级缓存中获取，因为对象已经缓存了，所以可以获取到暴露的对象
ABF --> DLBF : 返回提前暴露的对象(不在是返回的空对象)，并且在三级缓存中的数据对象放在二级缓存中earlySingletonObjects
DLBF --> AABF : 返回提前暴露的bean

AABF -> AABF : 依赖的bean获取到bean
AABF -> AABF : applyPropertyValues 方法返回
AABF -> AABF : populateBean方法返回
AABF -> AABF : initializeBean spring中的init方法，实现Aware操作，
AABF --> ABF : 返回bean
ABF --> DLBF : 返回bean
DLBF --> AAC : 返回bean

AABF -> AABF : populateBean (返回bean的填充)
AABF -> DSBR : createBean
DSBR -> DSBR : addSingleton(beanName, singletonObject): 将对象放到一级缓存，移除二级和三级缓存中的值
note right of DSBR
  依次清理：移除三级缓存和二级缓存singletonObjects(缓存对象)
end note

@enduml
```
